statement: In every magma, Equation 4033 (`x * y = (z * (z * z)) * w`) implies Equation 3686 (`x * x = (y * y) * (x * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0656
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op z (op z z)) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op (op y y) (op x z))
